name: @jaraxxxx/pi-extensions
description_en: A comprehensive collection of extension packages for Pi the coding agent — token guard, system context, tool profiler, project detector, dirty guard, permission gate, prompt customizer, auto commit, turn clock, branch navigator, and more.
description_zh: Pi 编码代理的扩展包综合集合 — 令牌保护、系统上下文、工具分析器、项目检测器、脏数据保护、权限门、提示自定义器、自动提交、时钟切换、分支导航器等
